query_normalized: predicting the impact of composition on the weibull modulus of ceramics materials science
rationale: The paper focuses on optimizing sintering parameters to achieve density and single-phase purity in KTaO$_3$ ceramics and reports on dielectric permittivity and thermal conductivity, but it does not measure, model, or discuss the Weibull modulus (a statistical measure of mechanical strength variability) or the specific impact of composition on this metric. Consequently, it fails to satisfy the criteria for same-mechanism evidence, variable overlap, or foundational methodology regarding the Weibul
